raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need bash command: remove only in /system, not subdirs. Use find with -maxdepth 1. Also delete .txt. Command: rm /system/*.txt? But if none, shell may error. Use find. So: find /system -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.txt' -delete.
